title: Shaken, Not Sorry 2.0: A One-night Bar Takeover
description: For one night, the bar transforms with bespoke cocktails, an exclusive snack menu, a guest DJ, and an atmosphere that invites you to stay a little longer.
longDescription:
Wednesday, May 20, 2026
8:00 PM – 12:00 AM
Dress code: Smart casual (no shorts please)
Reservation not required

For one night, the bar takes on a different energy. Bespoke cocktails, an exclusive Bar Snack Menu, a DJ setting the mood, and an atmosphere that invites you to stay a little longer. What happens after the first martini… is up to you.

Featuring
Kumar, The 2nd Floor Bartender
Guest DJ – DJ YuJin will be spinning a vibrant mix of house and disco, bringing his signature sound to the decks. He has performed at popular venues including Whisper Room, Madame Claude, Mondrian, and more.

Bespoke Cocktails
Happy Hour: 8:00 PM – 9:00 PM
Last orders at 11:30 PM

Kumar's Specials
Happy Hour: $15 | Regular: $18

Kumartini
Tanqueray Gin, Olive Brine & Cocchi Dry Vermouth

Barrel-aged Negroni
Tanqueray Gin & Cocchi Sweet Vermouth

French 75
Purple Imperial Gin, Citrus & Prosecco

Dirty Vesper Martini
Wheatly Vodka, Tanqueray Gin & Olive Brine

Martini No. 5
Wheatly Vodka, Cocchi Extra Dry Vermouth & Olive Stuffed Blue Cheese

Bar Snacks
8:00 PM – 11:00 PM (last orders at 10:45 PM)

STUFFED DATES $16
Pt Reyes blue cheese, prosciutto & hot honey drizzle

S&P FISH STREET TACOS $16
Tajin mangonada salsa, sunny-side-up quail egg & lime

ULTIMATE BLACK TRUFFLES GRILLED CHEESE BITES $18
Griddled sourdough, aged cheddar, candied thick-cut bacon, goat cheese & tomato bisque dip
Vegetarian version available upon request

TRUFFLE HOUSE FRIES $12
With umami aioli

BITE-SIZED SPICY FRIED STEAK FINGERS $18
Battered buttermilk, sriracha honey syrup, toasted sesame & spiked remoulade

title: Kids' Library Activities – May 2026
description: Celebrate Mother's Day with creative activities including a coloring contest and a heartwarming storytelling session about a mother's love and independence.
longDescription:
Celebrate Mother's Day with a creative craft activity and stand to win exciting prizes. Enjoy a heartwarming storytelling session about a mother's love and her son growing into independence.

"I Love You Mom" Creative & Coloring Contest
May 1 – 31, 2026
Thinkspace

Kids are invited to take part in our Mother's Day–themed coloring activity. Bring your creativity to life with vibrant colors and submit your masterpiece to Thinkspace for a chance to win exciting prizes.

One More Hug Storytelling
Saturday, May 30, 2026
10:30 AM – 11:00 AM

Chosen Title: One More Hug by Megan Alexander

Join a young boy as he navigates growing up with the comfort of his mother's reassuring hugs, building confidence along the way. Discover a heartfelt story of love, reassurance, and the enduring bond between parent and child.

title: TAC Book Club – May 2026
description: Join the book club discussion of "The Correspondent" by Virginia Evans, facilitated by Library Sub-Committee Member Kate Brundage. Complimentary event with light refreshments provided.
longDescription:
Wednesday, May 20, 2026
7:00 PM – 8:30 PM

Complimentary event; light refreshments provided
Facilitated by Library Sub-Committee Member Kate Brundage

Chosen Title:
The Correspondent by Virginia Evans

Sybil is seventy-three years old, in the winter of her life. She has always made sense of the world through writing letters, and through this epistolary novel, we see how she comes to terms with her past and present, and learns to forgive.

title: Junior Singles Tennis Tournament – Spring 2026
subtitle: Calling all young tennis enthusiasts! Showcase your skills, sportsmanship, and love for the game at this friendly competition.
description: A friendly junior singles tennis tournament across four age categories (10U, 12U, 14U, 16U), held over three days at the Tennis Courts.
longDescription:
Friday, May 15, 2026: 6:30 PM – 9:30 PM
Saturday, May 16, 2026: 1:00 PM – 8:00 PM
Sunday, May 17, 2026: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM

Calling all young tennis enthusiasts! Showcase your skills, sportsmanship, and love for the game at this friendly competition.

Categories: 10 and under, 12 and under, 14 and under, 16 and under

Price: $65 per person

Registration opens on April 15, 2026 via the TAC Book app (Log into TAC Book app > Click on Sessions > Tennis > Event > Date).

Terms and Conditions:
- Tournament schedules may change without prior notice in the event of inclement weather
- All players will be playing on full court
- Players will be assigned to a court and are not allowed to request court changes
- Players must report to the tournament desk at Tennis Courts 15 minutes before match start
- Prince balls will be used for the tournament

For more information, please contact the Sports Counter at 6739-4312 or sportscounter@amclub.org.sg.
reservation: Registration via TAC Book app opens April 15, 2026. Players must report to the tournament desk 15 minutes before match start.

title: Stephen K. Amos Live in Singapore: A Stand Up Comedy Show
subtitle: Laugh the night away at this month's TAC Comedy Club, featuring a one-night-only performance by Stephen K. Amos, known for his sharp observational humor.
description: A one-night-only stand-up comedy performance by British comedian Stephen K. Amos at the TAC Comedy Club, with open bar and popcorn included.
longDescription:
Sunday, May 17, 2026
Doors Open: 6:00 PM – 6:30 PM (open bar)
Showtime: 6:30 PM – 7:30 PM

Laugh the night away at this month's TAC Comedy Club, featuring a one-night-only performance by Stephen K. Amos, known for his sharp observational humor.

Watch some of his past performances here: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCB6nX8K91P6fLwB50UN9ddA
Listen to him here: https://www.audible.co.uk/search?keywords=Stephen%20K%20Amos&ref=
Learn more about him here: https://www.stephenkamos.com/

Members: $80 | Guests: $88
Price inclusive of two drinks and popcorn

About Stephen K. Amos
Stephen K. Amos is a celebrated British stand-up comedian and actor known for his sharp observational humor, storytelling, and socially conscious comedy. With a career spanning over three decades, he has performed sold-out shows across the UK, Europe, the US, and Australia, and is recognized for bringing laughter while addressing issues of race, culture, and LGBTQ+ experiences.

Stephen has appeared on numerous TV and radio programs, written for major comedy festivals, and continues to tour internationally, delighting audiences with his warmth, wit, and engaging stage presence.

Terms and Conditions:
- A no-show and 72-hour cancellation policy applies
- Photos and video may be taken and published on the Club's social media channels for marketing purposes
reservation: A no-show and 72-hour cancellation policy applies.

title: Perfect Your Mahjong Skills with Mahjong Lah's Intermediate Mahjong Class
subtitle: A three-session intermediate workshop in Singapore-style mahjong led by Mahjong Lah's founder Sabrina.
description: A three-session intermediate Singapore-style mahjong workshop led by Mahjong Lah's founder Sabrina, held on Wednesday afternoons.
longDescription:
Wednesdays, May 6, 13 & 20, 2026
2:00 PM – 4:00 PM

Member: $220
Guest: $230
Adult-only class; 18 years old and above

About Mahjong Lah
Mahjong Lah introduces Singapore-style mahjong through engaging sessions and workshops. Since 2019, it has welcomed thousands worldwide, making the game accessible while celebrating its cultural significance.

About Sabrina, Founder & Principal Coach of Mahjong Lah
Mahjong Lah, founded by Sabrina, combines her passion for cultural exchange and pedagogy to foster connection and integration through this cherished Singaporean tradition.

Register via the TAC Book app:
Log into the TAC Book app > Click on Club Event > Workshop > Date

Terms and Conditions:
- Min. 12 pax for the class to start; Max. 28 pax
- Each signup is for 3 classes. There will be no partial refunds for no-shows.
- No-shows and cancellations made less than 1 week in advance will be charged the full amount
reservation: Registration via TAC Book app. No-shows and cancellations made less than 1 week in advance will be charged the full amount.
